English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Essays written using holdings of the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 700
3.5 cubic feet. 3.5 cubic feet.
1892-2007. Manuscripts and printed materials. Collection consists of theses, essays, talks, and articles written through the use of collections now housed in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 1 2 3 4 5 6 ======= 1 2 3 4 5 6 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2077890
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2015
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, November 2015
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, November 2015
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Collection consists of theses, essays, talks, and articles written through the use of collections now housed in the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections.
NOTES
Individual items cataloged as subunits of parent records.
Cite As:
Essays Written Using Holdings of the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, #700. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library. 2077890 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a PDF finding aid.
Scope and Contents
All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide."'Er habe auss Angsten und Forcht geredt und bekennt--er seye kein Hex': ein Hexerprozess gegen den Spitalpfrundner Nikolaus Weitlufft aus Schwabisch Gmund im Jahr 1650"700-194Herrmann, Klaus-Jurgen1 items.20015
Scope and Contents
Reprint from Einhorn Jahrbuch 2001, Schwabisch Gmund, Germany. On the witchcraft trial of Nikolaus Weitlufft. ======= Link to a PDF finding aid.
